commit_types.name: style
commit_types.desc: Changes that do not affect the meaning of the code

commit_types.name: refactor
commit_types.desc: A code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature

commit_types.name: perf
commit_types.desc: A code change that improves performance

commit_types.name: chore
commit_types.desc: Changes to the build process or auxiliary tools

items.name: subject
items.desc: Concise description. Imperative, lower case, no final dot:

items.name: body
items.desc: Motivation for the change and contrast with previous behaviour:
